prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: NPT-GRAPHOOK-AMZ-HPN Product Type: SPORTING_GOODS Brand (from catalog): Shinobi and .com Existing Title: Ninja Equpiments Outdoor Climbing Ninja Grappling Hook Description: Bring out the ninja within you with this fully functional ninja climbing set. It features a ninja hook, foot spikes, and climbing claws. The tools are made of 440 Stainless Steel to ensure you get the best strength when climbing. While also great for climbing the claws and foot spikes can function as a self defense item. Specially designed ninja hook can be adjusted to be flat for your best convenience. Keeping this gear in hand will allow you to achieve the ways of the ninja. Good for your outdoor activity.

Ninja Grappling Hook With Cord

9.5" overall length - Hook Spike: 8" Length
Stainless Steel
Black Nylon Cord
Free Paracord that hold 300 lbs
Ninja Foot Spike

4.5" Overall Length
Stainless Steel
Comes in pair
Free Paracord that hold 300 lbs
Ninja Hand Claws

4.75" overall length
Stainless Steel
Adjustable Wrist Strap That Will Fit Almost Everyone
Comes in pair
Free Paracord that hold 300 lbs
Ninja Combo:

Grappling Hook, Foot Spikes, Hand Claws
All in one combo
Free Paracord that hold 300 lbs Search Terms: grappling hook with rope climbing ninja black light that pulls you up paracord hooks for adults gifts dad accessories Features: - Ninja Grappling Hook With Nylon Rope - 8" x 8" x 9.5" overall length With 33' Nylon rope - Light Weight Hook. Not for Climbing. - When you're making camp and need to pull and haul logs for a shelter or fire, the grappling hook with Rope is a dependable tool for the job - For Camping, outdoor use === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
